config.errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: user_events.dlq
config._comment: Connect-managed sink writing user_events into ClickHouse table azki.user_events with a DLQ — the alternative to the Kafka table engine (the primary path) when the warehouse should stay a pure sink. At-least-once (exactlyOnce=false) so it needs no ClickHouse Keeper/KeeperMap on this single node; `azki connect-register` creates the target table first.
